Eureka Lite Surface

Static seed surface. No JavaScript, no live search, no live source probes, no downloads.

Lite Overview Sources Evals Demo Queries Limitations

This is Eureka's lite static surface for old and low-capability browsers. It is a set of fixed pages generated from public data summaries.

  • Lite source summary
  • Lite eval summary
  • Lite demo query list
  • Lite limitations
  • Plain text surface
  • Static files surface

Current static status

  • Source records summarized: 9
  • Archive hard eval tasks: 6
  • Search audit queries: 64
  • Public-alpha routes summarized: 89

Machine-readable summaries: site, sources, evals, routes.

Eureka is a Python reference backend prototype, not production. This surface uses no scraping, performs no live source probes, and makes no external search calls. external baselines pending/manual; source placeholders remain placeholders.
